Description: Common Cold is a viral infection of the upper respiratory tract.
Medication_Layman: Drink vitamin C rich drinks and take steam inhalation.
Precautions_Layman: Avoid cold foods and keep a regular check on your temperature.

Description: Pneumonia is an inflammatory condition affecting the air sacs in the lungs caused by infection.
Medication_Layman: Seek immediate medical assessment at a hospital. Antibiotics and oxygen may be required.
Precautions_Layman: Rest completely and follow up with a doctor immediately. Do not attempt home care.
Pattern_Symptoms: shortness of breath,high fever,chest pain,rapid breathing,low oxygen

Description: Gastroenteritis is an inflammation of the stomach and intestines.
Medication_Layman: Drink plenty of fluids like ORS (Oral Rehydration Solution) or clear broth.
Precautions_Layman: Follow a bland diet of Bananas Rice Applesauce and Toast. Avoid solid food initially.

Description: Dengue is a mosquito-borne viral infection causing severe flu-like symptoms.
Medication_Layman: Drink papaya leaf juice and stay very well hydrated. Use only Paracetamol.
Precautions_Layman: Keep mosquitoes away with nets or repellents. Avoid fatty or spicy foods.

Description: Influenza is a common viral infection that can be deadly especially in high-risk groups.
Medication_Layman: Get strict bed rest and drink plenty of fluids. Use Paracetamol for fever.
Precautions_Layman: Isolate from others to prevent spread and monitor your breathing.

Description: Allergy is an immune system reaction to a substance in the environment.
Medication_Layman: Avoid the trigger and use mild antihistamines if prescribed.
Precautions_Layman: Apply calamine lotion to rashes and cover sensitive areas.

Description: Migraine is a severe headache often accompanied by nausea and sensitivity to light.
Medication_Layman: Take prescribed pain relievers and rest in a dark quiet room.
Precautions_Layman: Practice meditation and reduce stress. Use polarized glasses in the sun.

Description: Bronchial Asthma is a respiratory condition characterized by inflammation of the airways.
Medication_Layman: Use your prescribed inhaler and take deep calm breaths.
Precautions_Layman: Get away from triggers and switch to loose clothing to breathe easier.

Description: Typhoid is a bacterial infection that can lead to high fever and stomach issues.
Medication_Layman: Requires antibiotic therapy prescribed by a doctor.
Precautions_Layman: Eat high-calorie vegetables and stay hydrated. Consult a doctor immediately.

Description: Malaria is a mosquito-borne infectious disease.
Medication_Layman: Requires prescribed antimalarial drugs and fever reducers.
Precautions_Layman: Consult the nearest hospital and avoid oily or non-vegetarian foods.
